reasoning: The control CA-7-g focuses on continuous monitoring and reporting of security and privacy. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that audit logging is enabled and configured for retention, which aligns with monitoring changes and activities within the cluster. Additionally, monitoring network policies and admission controllers can help detect unauthorized changes or configurations, similar to monitoring network ACLs and gateways in cloud environments.
